steps: Contact BNP Paribas Securities to request refund of EUR 3,744.00 excess withholding on TotalEnergies SE dividend
Submit formal reclaim citing FR-NO tax treaty Article 10 limiting withholding to 15% on dividend income
Provide account 901234567 statement showing 13.5% tax applied versus treaty-compliant 15% rate
Request correction within 30 days with supporting treaty documentation
